# melee-agent Capabilities (auto-generated ‚Äî run `melee-agent capabilities generate`)

> Standalone `tools/*.py` scripts and setup paths are documented in [agent-tool-manifest.md](agent-tool-manifest.md), not here.

## CLI commands
- `melee-agent analytics errors` ‚Äî Show detailed error breakdown with examples.
- `melee-agent analytics export` ‚Äî Export full analytics data to JSON for external analysis.
- `melee-agent analytics functions` ‚Äî List individual function attempts with detailed metrics.
- `melee-agent analytics sessions` ‚Äî List analyzed decomp sessions with per-session metrics.
- `melee-agent analytics summary` ‚Äî Show summary metrics for decomp agent performance.
- `melee-agent analytics trends` ‚Äî Show trends of key metrics over time with TUI graphs.
- `melee-agent attempts list` ‚Äî List functions with tracked attempts.
- `melee-agent attempts record` ‚Äî Record one attempt independent of scratch score history.
- `melee-agent attempts show` ‚Äî Show attempt history for one function.
- `melee-agent audit discover-prs` ‚Äî Discover functions from GitHub PRs and link them.
- `melee-agent audit duplicates` ‚Äî Find duplicate function matches across branches and worktrees.
- `melee-agent audit net-new` ‚Äî Classify branch functions as net-new or duplicate against upstream.
- `melee-agent audit recover-matches` ‚Äî Surface still-unmatched functions with stranded local `match:` commits.
- `melee-agent capabilities generate` ‚Äî Regenerate the capability brief and full inventory doc.
- `melee-agent capabilities search` ‚Äî Find existing commands/skills matching a task description.
- `melee-agent capabilities show` ‚Äî Show full detail for a group (or everything).
- `melee-agent commit apply` ‚Äî Apply a matched function to the melee project.
- `melee-agent commit check-callers` ‚Äî Find all callers of a function in the codebase.
- `melee-agent commit format` ‚Äî Run clang-format on staged changes.
- `melee-agent compilers` ‚Äî List available compilers.
- `melee-agent debug coalesce-search` ‚Äî Search source-shape probes by target coalescing/interference objective.
- `melee-agent debug diff-schedule` ‚Äî Diff real vs forced scheduler-window decisions.
- `melee-agent debug dump doctor` ‚Äî Diagnose local mwcc_debug setup before dump/inspect workflows fail.
- `melee-agent debug dump local` ‚Äî Local mwcc_debug pcdump (macOS+wibo+Zig-built DLL, no SSH).
- `melee-agent debug dump remote` ‚Äî Dump MWCC's internal IR + codegen for a TU and emit pcdump.txt to stdout.
- `melee-agent debug dump restore-object-report` ‚Äî Safely restore one source's object and build report.
- `melee-agent debug dump setup` ‚Äî One-time setup for local mwcc_debug pcdump (macOS+wibo).
- `melee-agent debug inspect analyze` ‚Äî Summarize a pcdump.txt: per-virtual register live ranges, use counts, interferences, and 'could have been' candidate sets.
- `melee-agent debug inspect asm` ‚Äî Show the current compiled assembly for a function.
- `melee-agent debug inspect diagnose` ‚Äî Current-tooling diagnosis: is there a quick win we haven't tried?
- `melee-agent debug inspect diff` ‚Äî Compare two source or pcdump inputs through the mwcc-debug pipeline.
- `melee-agent debug inspect explain-diff` ‚Äî Unified diff diagnosis: read checkdiff JSON (or auto-generate it for a function) and produce a structured, ranked list of recommendations with specific source-level actions and estimated costs.
- `melee-agent debug inspect explain-schedule` ‚Äî Explain observed scheduler windows for known force-schedule targets.
- `melee-agent debug inspect explain-virtual` ‚Äî Explain virtual-register source/interference attribution.
- `melee-agent debug inspect first-divergence` ‚Äî Find the earliest allocator decision diverging from a same-source target.
- `melee-agent debug inspect frame-reservations` ‚Äî Inspect stack-frame gaps and implicit reserved ranges.
- `melee-agent debug inspect guide` ‚Äî Tier 4: human-readable diagnostic for stuck-function debugging.
- `melee-agent debug inspect rank-callees` ‚Äî Predict the callee-save cascade for a function before compiling.
- `melee-agent debug inspect simulate` ‚Äî Simulate MWCC's coloring algorithm on a function and diff against actuals.
- `melee-agent debug inspect stack-homes` ‚Äî Explain final-only FPR stack-home targets and source-shape leads.
- `melee-agent debug inspect stuck` ‚Äî One-shot diagnostic for a stuck function.
- `melee-agent debug inspect tiebreak` ‚Äî Register-coloring tiebreak surrogate: predict assignments from the interference graph (G1, validated 100% on non-truncated functions) and run what-ifs (add/remove an interference edge, or move a...
- `melee-agent debug inspect trace-copy` ‚Äî Trace where a pcode copy appears and why it disappears.
- `melee-agent debug inspect var-to-virtual` ‚Äî Bridge: given a source variable name, predict its MWCC virtual.
- `melee-agent debug inspect virtual-to-ig` ‚Äî Map a visible pcode virtual register to allocator graph identity.
- `melee-agent debug inspect virtual-to-var` ‚Äî Bridge inverse: given a virtual register, predict the source variable name (decl-order heuristic), including the variable's scope path (function-top vs nested-block).
- `melee-agent debug intervene coalesce` ‚Äî Run/report a scoped coalesce intervention backed by the mwcc_debug DLL.
- `melee-agent debug mutate control-flow-shape-search` ‚Äî Compile and score conservative control-flow shape source probes.
- `melee-agent debug mutate decl-orders` ‚Äî Tier 7b: enumerate local-decl orderings, find ones that improve match%.
- `melee-agent debug mutate frame-transform-search` ‚Äî Compile and score directed source transforms for frame-size divergence.
- `melee-agent debug mutate indexed-struct-search` ‚Äî Compile and score indexed struct pointer dematerialization probes.
- `melee-agent debug mutate insert-alias` ‚Äî Insert a fresh local copy of a variable before the N-th reading statement and rewrite that statement to use the alias.
- `melee-agent debug mutate lifetime-layout` ‚Äî Explore lifetime/layout source probes and attribute pressure deltas.
- `melee-agent debug mutate name-magic-source-declarations` ‚Äî Generate source declarations/references for name-magic relocation mismatches.
- `melee-agent debug mutate search` ‚Äî Tier 3: multi-start search over targeted mutation seeds.
- `melee-agent debug mutate simplify-order` ‚Äî Search for source variants that produce a desired simplify order.
- `melee-agent debug mutate type-change` ‚Äî Change a local variable's declared type.
- `melee-agent debug permute bootstrap` ‚Äî Bootstrap a decomp-permuter function dir from the current repo source.
- `melee-agent debug permute candidate-audit` ‚Äî Audit permuter candidates and print a compact status summary.
- `melee-agent debug permute config` ‚Äî Generate a decomp-permuter settings.toml tuned for the detected pattern.
- `melee-agent debug permute doctor` ‚Äî Validate local decomp-permuter paths before run/config/verify.
- `melee-agent debug permute fix-compile` ‚Äî Fix decomp-permuter's `compile.sh` for macOS+wine compatibility.
- `melee-agent debug permute local-orphans` ‚Äî Detect orphaned local wibo/MWCC compile processes.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote doctor` ‚Äî Check whether a remote target is ready to run decomp-permuter.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote fetch` ‚Äî Fetch remote permuter outputs into the local permuter directory.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote list` ‚Äî List local remote permuter job metadata with live active/dead status.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote prune` ‚Äî Delete stale remote-runs directories on remote coders.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote ps` ‚Äî Dashboard of active remote permuter sessions across all coders.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote reap` ‚Äî Stop remote permuter jobs that are byte-matched or plateaued.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote status` ‚Äî Show remote permuter job activity and stale cleanup guidance.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote stop` ‚Äî Stop a remote permuter tmux session.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote submit` ‚Äî Submit a local decomp-permuter function directory to a remote target.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote tail` ‚Äî Print a remote permuter job log snapshot.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote targets` ‚Äî List configured remote permuter targets.
- `melee-agent debug permute remote triage` ‚Äî Summarize all local remote permuter jobs for convergence triage.
- `melee-agent debug permute run` ‚Äî Tier 2: run decomp-permuter with mwcc-debug score blended in.
- `melee-agent debug permute setup-simplify-order-scorer` ‚Äî Wire decomp-permuter to save candidates that improve simplify-order.
- `melee-agent debug permute triage` ‚Äî Tier 7e: batch-triage decomp-permuter output candidates.
- `melee-agent debug permute verify` ‚Äî Tier 7a: apply a permuter candidate to the real source and verify.
- `melee-agent debug retro dump` ‚Äî Dump retail compiler internals for FN in SRC.
- `melee-agent debug retro setup` ‚Äî Clone + build retrowin32 and cadmic at pinned SHAs (idempotent).
- `melee-agent debug retro verify` ‚Äî Cross-check a retro dump against the existing DLL pcdump (control TU).
- `melee-agent debug search combine` ‚Äî Recombine complementary directed-search candidate source hunks.
- `melee-agent debug search directed` ‚Äî Run the directed (pcdump-guided) search layer for FUNCTION in UNIT.
- `melee-agent debug search minimize` ‚Äî Delta-reduce candidate subhunks while preserving proof assignments.
- `melee-agent debug search plan-transforms` ‚Äî Plan source-transform families and instantiate bounded probes.
- `melee-agent debug search run` ‚Äî Run a search over source variants for FUNCTION in UNIT.
- `melee-agent debug search status` ‚Äî Show status of the search substrate (store, config).
- `melee-agent debug search structure` ‚Äî Run structure-search axes and rank candidate variants.
- `melee-agent debug search triage` ‚Äî Triage directed-search candidates by source delta and proof movement.
- `melee-agent debug select-order-search` ‚Äî Search source-shape probes by target COLORGRAPH select-order objective.
- `melee-agent debug solve allocator-ceiling` ‚Äî Classify exhausted allocator-rotation evidence without compiling.
- `melee-agent debug solve coloring` ‚Äî Inverse register coloring: enumerate ¬ß1.5-filtered node-set/content perturbations, predict their coloring with the SELECT surrogate, map winners to C moves, emit a ranked worksheet.
- `melee-agent debug solve node-set-split` ‚Äî Realize a solve-coloring node-set split with source-shape candidates; use --coupled with --node-set-delta for interdependent rotations.
- `melee-agent debug suggest casts` ‚Äî Tier 7d: static lint for cast-mismatch and signedness patterns.
- `melee-agent debug suggest coalesce` ‚Äî Suggest C-source patterns producing a specific coalesce, or discover candidate coalesces that would shorten the cascade.
- `melee-agent debug suggest control-flow-shape` ‚Äî Suggest source-level control-flow shape transforms from ASM diff JSON.
- `melee-agent debug suggest frame` ‚Äî Suggest source/probe levers for stack-frame/local-area residuals.
- `melee-agent debug suggest inlines` ‚Äî Suggest hidden inline/helper/source-shape candidates.
- `melee-agent debug suggest register-tiebreak` ‚Äî Suggest source levers for compiler-temp register tiebreaks.
- `melee-agent debug suggest schedule` ‚Äî Suggest C source reshapes for a divergent scheduler decision.
- `melee-agent debug suggest signatures` ‚Äî Suggest source levers for checkdiff call-prep signature mismatches.
- `melee-agent debug target derive` ‚Äî Tier 4: extract the current virtual‚Üíphysical mapping as a target spec.
- `melee-agent debug target dtk-objdump` ‚Äî Emit GNU objdump-shaped PPC disassembly using the project dtk binary.
- `melee-agent debug target force-phys-from-diff` ‚Äî Derive --force-phys targets from a register-only checkdiff.
- `melee-agent debug target match-iter-first` ‚Äî Recommend --force-iter-first arguments by reading the expected .s.
- `melee-agent debug target order-target` ‚Äî Derive a proven order-distance target (the ¬ß4.2 class partition).
- `melee-agent debug target reanchor` ‚Äî Express a saved TargetSpec in a new compile's ig-numbering (Unit 3).
- `melee-agent debug target score-dump` ‚Äî Tier 4: score a pcdump's coloring decisions against a target spec.
- `melee-agent debug target score-force-phys` ‚Äî Permuter scorer: lex-encoded force-phys assignment hits.
- `melee-agent debug target score-simplify-order` ‚Äî Permuter scorer: lex-encoded simplify-order + precolor distance.
- `melee-agent debug target score-source` ‚Äî Compile a source via debug dump local, then score against a target.
- `melee-agent debug util name-magic` ‚Äî Rename anonymous @N symbols in a .o's .sdata2 to user-supplied names.
- `melee-agent debug util patterns` ‚Äî Tier 7c: dump the catalog of recurring MWCC mutation patterns.
- `melee-agent debug util verify-name-magic` ‚Äî Compile, optionally rename anonymous SDA2 constants, then checkdiff.
- `melee-agent docker down` ‚Äî Stop local decomp.me instance.
- `melee-agent docker status` ‚Äî Check status of local decomp.me instance.
- `melee-agent docker up` ‚Äî Start local decomp.me instance.
- `melee-agent extract files` ‚Äî List all source files with matching statistics.
- `melee-agent extract get` ‚Äî Extract a specific function's ASM and context.
- `melee-agent extract list` ‚Äî List unmatched functions from the melee project.
- `melee-agent ghidra cache-build` ‚Äî Build the SQLite cache from the Ghidra project (one-time, ~minutes).
- `melee-agent ghidra decompile` ‚Äî Decompile a function using Ghidra's decompiler.
- `melee-agent ghidra func` ‚Äî Get function metadata from the cache (name, size, callers/callees count).
- `melee-agent ghidra setup` ‚Äî Guide one-time Ghidra project creation (manual GUI import).
- `melee-agent ghidra status` ‚Äî Check Ghidra installation, project, and DOL availability.
- `melee-agent ghidra strings` ‚Äî Find string references in a function, or search all strings by pattern.
- `melee-agent ghidra xrefs` ‚Äî Find callers (--dir to) or callees (--dir from) via the cache.
- `melee-agent harvest` ‚Äî Run a registered harvest harness across a taxonomy work bucket.
- `melee-agent hook install` ‚Äî Install git pre-commit hooks for validation.
- `melee-agent hook uninstall` ‚Äî Remove git pre-commit hooks installed by melee-agent.
- `melee-agent hook validate` ‚Äî Validate staged changes against project guidelines.
- `melee-agent issue campaign-report` ‚Äî Report tooling-campaign ROI, generality, and remaining gaps.
- `melee-agent issue claim` ‚Äî Claim an open issue so other agents skip it.
- `melee-agent issue list` ‚Äî List reported tooling issues.
- `melee-agent issue note` ‚Äî Append context to an open tooling issue without resolving it.
- `melee-agent issue release` ‚Äî Release your claim on an issue without resolving it.
- `melee-agent issue report` ‚Äî Report a tooling issue, feature request, papercut, or blocker.
- `melee-agent issue resolve` ‚Äî Mark a reported tooling issue as resolved.
- `melee-agent issue show` ‚Äî Show one reported tooling issue.
- `melee-agent layout audit` ‚Äî Report data-layout discrepancies for a TU's .c file.
- `melee-agent mismatch add` ‚Äî Record a mismatch pattern inline from a matching session.
- `melee-agent mismatch backfill claim-task` ‚Äî Claim a pending task for analysis.
- `melee-agent mismatch backfill complete-task` ‚Äî Complete a task with analysis results from a JSON file.
- `melee-agent mismatch backfill create-job` ‚Äî Create a new backfill job.
- `melee-agent mismatch backfill get-task` ‚Äî Get details for a specific task.
- `melee-agent mismatch backfill job-status` ‚Äî Show detailed status for a backfill job.
- `melee-agent mismatch backfill list-jobs` ‚Äî List all backfill jobs.
- `melee-agent mismatch backfill list-tasks` ‚Äî List tasks for a backfill job.
- `melee-agent mismatch get` ‚Äî Get details for a specific pattern.
- `melee-agent mismatch init` ‚Äî Initialize the database with schema and sample patterns.
- `melee-agent mismatch list` ‚Äî List all patterns.
- `melee-agent mismatch m2c` ‚Äî Find patterns related to an m2c artifact (e.g., M2C_STRUCT_COPY).
- `melee-agent mismatch migrate` ‚Äî Migrate patterns from a markdown file.
- `melee-agent mismatch opcode` ‚Äî Find patterns by opcode mismatch (expected vs actual).
- `melee-agent mismatch record-success` ‚Äî Record that a pattern helped match a function.
- `melee-agent mismatch review approve` ‚Äî Approve a candidate as a new pattern.
- `melee-agent mismatch review list` ‚Äî List pending candidate patterns.
- `melee-agent mismatch review merge` ‚Äî Merge a candidate into an existing pattern.
- `melee-agent mismatch review reject` ‚Äî Reject a candidate pattern.
- `melee-agent mismatch review show` ‚Äî Show details for a candidate pattern.
- `melee-agent mismatch rm` ‚Äî Delete a mismatch pattern by ID.
- `melee-agent mismatch search` ‚Äî Full-text search across patterns.
- `melee-agent mismatch show` ‚Äî Alias for `get`; show details for a specific pattern.
- `melee-agent mismatch stats` ‚Äî Show database statistics.
- `melee-agent opseq` ‚Äî Alias for tools/table-typer opseq opcode-sequence search.
- `melee-agent patterns anti-pattern` ‚Äî Check if code uses known anti-patterns and suggest fixes.
- `melee-agent patterns anti-patterns` ‚Äî Check if code uses known anti-patterns and suggest fixes.
- `melee-agent patterns api` ‚Äî Show how APIs are commonly used in matched code.
- `melee-agent patterns check` ‚Äî Check a source file for common anti-patterns and suggest simplifications.
- `melee-agent patterns inlines` ‚Äî Find patterns that could be extracted into inline functions.
- `melee-agent patterns similar` ‚Äî Find matched functions with similar structure to a target function.
- `melee-agent patterns wrapper` ‚Äî Find wrapper functions for common field access patterns.
- `melee-agent patterns wrappers` ‚Äî Find wrapper functions for common field access patterns.
- `melee-agent pr check` ‚Äî Check PR status and validate description.
- `melee-agent pr describe` ‚Äî Generate PR description showing matched functions.
- `melee-agent pr feedback` ‚Äî Get comprehensive feedback on a PR including reviews, checks, and decomp.dev report.
- `melee-agent pr link` ‚Äî Link functions to a GitHub PR.
- `melee-agent pr link-batch` ‚Äî Link all functions in a category to a PR.
- `melee-agent pr list` ‚Äî List functions by PR association.
- `melee-agent pr status` ‚Äî Show PR status summary for all tracked functions.
- `melee-agent pr unlink` ‚Äî Remove PR association from functions.
- `melee-agent scratch compile` ‚Äî Compile a scratch and show the diff.
- `melee-agent scratch create` ‚Äî Create a new scratch for a function on decomp.me.
- `melee-agent scratch decompile` ‚Äî Get m2c automatic decompilation for a scratch.
- `melee-agent scratch get` ‚Äî Get full scratch information.
- `melee-agent scratch recover-best` ‚Äî Recover the best retained high-water source snapshot for a function.
- `melee-agent scratch search` ‚Äî Search for scratches on decomp.me.
- `melee-agent scratch search-context` ‚Äî Search through a scratch's context for patterns.
- `melee-agent scratch sync-from-repo` ‚Äî Update a scratch's source code from the repo.
- `melee-agent scratch update` ‚Äî Update a scratch's source code from a file.
- `melee-agent scratch update-context` ‚Äî Update a scratch's context from the repo.
- `melee-agent setup dol` ‚Äî Register the base DOL file for builds.
- `melee-agent setup status` ‚Äî Show current setup status.
- `melee-agent state agents` ‚Äî Show active agents and their work.
- `melee-agent state cleanup` ‚Äî Identify and clean up orphaned tracking entries.
- `melee-agent state diff-remotes` ‚Äî Show functions that differ between origin and upstream.
- `melee-agent state export` ‚Äî Export database state to JSON for backup/debugging.
- `melee-agent state history` ‚Äî Show audit history for a function.
- `melee-agent state populate-addresses` ‚Äî Populate canonical_address for existing functions.
- `melee-agent state prs` ‚Äî Show all PRs and their associated functions.
- `melee-agent state rebuild` ‚Äî Rebuild database from underlying sources.
- `melee-agent state refresh-prs` ‚Äî Refresh PR states from GitHub.
- `melee-agent state stale` ‚Äî Show data that may be stale and needs verification.
- `melee-agent state status` ‚Äî Show current state of tracked work.
- `melee-agent state sync-report` ‚Äî Sync function match percentages from report.json.
- `melee-agent state urls` ‚Äî Show all URLs for a function (local scratch, production scratch, PR).
- `melee-agent state validate` ‚Äî Validate database state for consistency and correctness (bidirectional).
- `melee-agent struct callback` ‚Äî Look up callback function signatures.
- `melee-agent struct issues` ‚Äî Show known type issues in struct definitions.
- `melee-agent struct offset` ‚Äî Look up what field is at a specific offset.
- `melee-agent struct show` ‚Äî Show struct layout with field offsets.
- `melee-agent struct verify` ‚Äî Detect wrong struct-field offsets by comparing per-function displacements.
- `melee-agent stub add` ‚Äî Add a stub marker for a function in the correct source file.
- `melee-agent stub check` ‚Äî Check if a function needs a stub marker.
- `melee-agent stub list` ‚Äî List stub markers in source files.
- `melee-agent sync auth` ‚Äî Configure authentication for production decomp.me.
- `melee-agent sync clear` ‚Äî Clear cached production cookies.
- `melee-agent sync dedup` ‚Äî De-duplicate scratches - pick best scratch when multiple exist for same function.
- `melee-agent sync fetch` ‚Äî Fetch a scratch from production decomp.me.
- `melee-agent sync find-duplicates` ‚Äî Find functions with multiple scratches on the server.
- `melee-agent sync fix-ownership` ‚Äî Fix ownership of synced scratches that have no owner.
- `melee-agent sync list` ‚Äî List functions that can be synced to production.
- `melee-agent sync production` ‚Äî Sync completed functions from local instance to production decomp.me.
- `melee-agent sync slugs` ‚Äî Show the local->production slug mapping.
- `melee-agent sync status` ‚Äî Check cf_clearance cookie status and test connection to production.
- `melee-agent sync validate` ‚Äî Validate scratches before syncing to production.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine claim-task` ‚Äî Claim the next pending mining task.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine clusters` ‚Äî List normalized before/after diff clusters for existing-function tasks.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine complete-additions` ‚Äî Complete pending function additions as out of scope.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine complete-cluster` ‚Äî Complete all pending tasks in a normalized diff cluster.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine complete-task` ‚Äî Complete a mining task from a result JSON file.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine create-job` ‚Äî Create a mining job from unseen commit/function source transitions.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine fail-task` ‚Äî Mark a mining task as failed.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine get-task` ‚Äî Show one mining task.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine job-status` ‚Äî Show status for a mining job.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine ledger-stats` ‚Äî Show ledger counts by status.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine list-tasks` ‚Äî List tasks for a mining job.
- `melee-agent transform-corpus mine results` ‚Äî List completed mining task classifications.

## Skills
- `/backfill-analysis` ‚Äî Analyze matched functions to discover mismatch patterns. Use when backfilling the mismatch-db from git history.
- `/collect-for-pr` ‚Äî Collect pending worktree commits into a PR for review. Use this skill when subdirectory worktrees have accumulated 4-7+ commits that should be batched together and submitted for review. Invoked with /collect-for-pr or automatically when monitoring worktree status.
- `/decomp` ‚Äî Use when decompiling or matching Super Smash Bros. Melee functions in this repo, especially when iterating on C source against assembly diffs.
- `/decomp-fixup` ‚Äî Fix build issues for matched functions in the Melee decompilation project. Use this skill when builds are failing due to header mismatches, signature issues, or caller updates needed after a function has been matched. Invoked with /decomp-fixup [function_name] or automatically when diagnosing build failures.
- `/decomp-remote` ‚Äî Match decompiled C code using the remote decomp.me server workflow. Use this skill when you want to iterate on a scratch using the remote server. For most tasks, prefer /decomp which uses the faster local workflow.
- `/discord-knowledge` ‚Äî Search Discord knowledge base for decompilation patterns, compiler tricks, and historical context. Use when stuck on matching or need background on a technique.
- `/first-pass-decomp` ‚Äî Generate initial C code from assembly using local m2c. Use this skill to get first-pass decompilations for unmatched functions before manual refinement.
- `/ghidra` ‚Äî Use cached Ghidra-derived xrefs and string lookups (fast SQLite queries) for cross-reference discovery and string-based naming. Also offers live Ghidra decompile as a heavy fallback. Use when finding callers across the whole binary or naming functions from debug strings.
- `/item-decomp` ‚Äî Conventions and domain knowledge for item-related code in Melee. Use when decompiling item functions (it_* prefix).
- `/melee-debug` ‚Äî [EXPERIMENTAL] Debug Melee in Dolphin emulator. Breakpoints are unreliable with JIT mode. Use for memory inspection only until stability improves.
- `/mismatch-db` ‚Äî Knowledge base for common assembly mismatches. Use to interpret diffs when matching functions.
- `/mwcc-debug` ‚Äî Dump MWCC's internal codegen passes (BEFORE/AFTER REGISTER COLORING, instruction scheduling, etc.) for a Melee TU. Runs locally on macOS (via wibo+Zig-built DLL) by default, or on a remote Windows host as a fallback. Use when stuck on register-allocation cascades or other last-mile matching issues; complement to mwcc-inspect (which shows front-end IR / ENodes / ObjObjects).
- `/mwcc-inspect` ‚Äî Inspect MWCC's internal IR (ENodes, ObjObjects, Statements) for a Melee TU by running RootCubed/mwcc-inspector on a remote Windows host. Use when stuck on register-allocation cascades or other last-mile matching issues that mismatch-db, opseq, ghidra, and discord-knowledge haven't explained ‚Äî this is the next tool to reach for, not the first.
- `/mwcc-retro` ‚Äî Dump retail MWCC GC/1.2.5n front-end IRO per-pass traces + backend PCode, register-allocator internals, and stack maps via retrowin32+gdb. Use when you need front-end optimizer pass visibility (CSE, loop unrolling, propagation, DCE) or a retail-vs-debug-DLL fidelity check. Not first-resort ‚Äî reach for mismatch-db, opseq, ghidra, discord-knowledge, and mwcc-debug first.
- `/opseq` ‚Äî Find functions by opcode sequence patterns. Use when stuck on a function and want to find similar already-decompiled code for reference.
- `/ppc-ref` ‚Äî Look up PowerPC instruction set documentation. Use when you need to understand what a specific instruction does, its operands, or behavior.
- `/prepare-pr` ‚Äî Use this skill when the user wants to prepare decomp work for an upstream PR.
- `/sync-upstream` ‚Äî Use this skill when the user wants to sync their fork with the upstream doldecomp/melee repository.
- `/understand` ‚Äî Document and name functions, structs, and fields in Melee decompilation. Use for improving readability, discovering function purposes, and naming unknown fields. Invoked with /understand <target> where target is a function, file, or struct name.
- `/workflow` ‚Äî Use this skill to manage git branches and prepare changes for upstream PRs.
